Container.Name: stream-scan
Container.Overview: Weekly scanner that finds new original content on Netflix, Hulu, Prime, Max, Peacock, Paramount+, Apple TV, and Disney+. Generates a beautiful HTML digest with cover art and summaries. Click WebUI to open the latest digest in your browser.
Container.Description: Stream Scan — weekly new release digest with cover art. Click WebUI to view.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port to access the digest in your browser. The WebUI button uses this.

Config.Name: Output Directory
Config.Description: Where HTML digest files are saved (also served via WebUI).

Config.Name: State Directory
Config.Description: Stores last-run timestamp. Do not delete.

Config.Name: Trakt Client ID
Config.Description: Get free API key at https://trakt.tv/oauth/applications/new

Config.Name: TMDB API Key
Config.Description: Get free API key at https://www.themoviedb.org/settings/api

Config.Name: Scan Day
Config.Description: Day of week to run scan (monday, tuesday, etc.)

Config.Name: Scan Hour
Config.Description: Hour of day to run (24h format, e.g. 6 = 6am)

Config.Name: Services
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of services to scan
